title: tephrosia macrantha
intro: Tephrosia macrantha, also known as the Horsefly Tree or Bush, is a flowering plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia macrantha include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tephrosia macrantha can be prepared as a herbal remedy through tea infusions, decoctions, or powder forms, making it accessible for various medicinal applications.
